相关PoC:
CVE-2026-11417-AWS-CDK-RCE: Technical writeup and Proof of Concept (PoC) for CVE-2026-11417: OS Command Injection / Remote Code Execution (RCE) in AWS CDK's NodejsFunction.

item.title: CVE-2026-6130 - CVE-2026-6130 - 未命名漏洞
item.description:
严重程度: Unknown
发布日期: Unknown
来源: Unknown
描述: 暂无详细描述
相关PoC:
local-mcp: A lightweight stdio-based MCP server for local file system operations — read, write, edit, search, exec for AI assistants. Specially optimized for Chatbox: bat-bypass for exec (CVE-2026-6130), b64 encoding to eliminate escaping issues, and multi-pattern regex for precise code block targeting.

item.title: CVE-2026-31431 - CVE-2026-31431 - 未命名漏洞
item.description:
严重程度: Unknown
发布日期: Unknown
来源: Unknown
描述: 暂无详细描述
相关PoC:
CVE-2026-31431-Linux-Copy-Fail: Exploit CVE-2026-31431 on Linux using a Rust implementation to achieve local privilege escalation via an arbitrary page cache write primitive.
copyfail-rs: Exploit and detect CVE-2026-31431 vulnerabilities using a static binary that monitors system integrity and bypasses PAM authentication.
